message:
fix(doctor): eliminate double-parsing and remove unnecessary clone

Bug fixes found during code review:

1. Performance: validate_archive was parsing tweets.js twice
   - check_duplicate_ids and check_timestamp_consistency each called
     parser.parse_tweets() independently
   - Now parse once in validate_archive and pass to both check functions
   - Added check_duplicate_ids_in_tweets() and
     check_timestamp_consistency_in_tweets() variants that accept
     pre-parsed tweets

2. Memory: benchmark_index_load cloned durations unnecessarily
   - Removed clone since we don't use original after sorting

These fixes improve performance for large archives (100k+ tweets)
by eliminating redundant parsing work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
